title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop
summary: Leistritz Extrusion will host a Reactive Extrusion (REX) Workshop May 13-14 at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte, NC.
charlotte_impact: Promotes innovation in polymer extrusion technology and strengthens Charlotte's position as a hub for advanced manufacturing.

title: Suspect Arrested in Charlotte Grocery Store Stabbing
summary: Police apprehended a woman with a criminal history two weeks after she stabbed a pregnant woman in a Charlotte grocery store parking lot.
charlotte_impact: Addresses public safety concerns and highlights the need for increased vigilance in preventing violent crime.

title: Repeat Offender Accused of Stabbing Pregnant Woman
summary: Marvina Butler-Hardy, a repeat offender, is accused of stabbing a pregnant woman in a Charlotte parking lot. She has nine prior convictions.
charlotte_impact: Raises questions about repeat offenders and the effectiveness of the justice system in preventing violent crime.

title: Braylon Clark Details Visit with Tennessee Football
summary: 2028 Charlotte Country Day wide-out Braylon Clark visits Knoxville for a football program visit.
charlotte_impact: Showcases local talent and provides insight into college recruitment processes for young athletes.

title: Choosing the Best Deck Builder in Charlotte
summary: Tips on selecting a reliable deck builder in Charlotte to enhance your home's outdoor living space and property value.
charlotte_impact: Provides valuable advice for homeowners looking to improve their properties and enjoy outdoor living.

title: Students Design Brand for Brown Museum
summary: Students design a brand for Charlotte Hawkins Brown's Canary Cottage, a 100-year-old museum in Guilford County, NC.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the importance of preserving local history and engaging students in community projects.

title: FG Nexus CEO to Speak at FII Priority Miami 2026
summary: FG Nexus CEO Maja Vujinovic will co-chair the digital assets conclave and speak on stablecoins at FII Priority Miami 2026.
charlotte_impact: Showcases Charlotte's involvement in the digital assets industry and its growing influence in financial technology.

title: Chilly, Dry, and Breezy Start to the Week
summary: A Freeze Watch has been issued for Ashe, Watauga, and Avery counties for lows dropping below freezing Tuesday morning.
charlotte_impact: Informs residents of potential weather hazards and allows them to take necessary precautions.

title: Man Dead in Northwest Charlotte Shooting
summary: Police responded to a report of a shooting into an occupied home in northwest Charlotte, resulting in one fatality.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing issue of gun violence in the community and the need for effective crime prevention strategies.

title: Blue Line Collision Kills Man in Charlotte
summary: A man was found unresponsive near the Blue Line tracks at North Tryon Street and Orr Road after a collision.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about safety on public transportation and the need for improved safety measures.

title: One Killed in Home Invasion Attempt
summary: Statesville police report a fatality during a home invasion attempt that occurred during daylight hours on Saturday.
charlotte_impact: Addresses concerns about home security and the potential for violent crime in residential areas.

title: Power Restored for Most Duke Energy Customers
summary: Power has been restored for most Duke Energy customers, with some scattered outages remaining, primarily in the University Area.
charlotte_impact: Provides updates on infrastructure reliability and the utility company's response to power outages.

title: Safety is Priority for New Transit Authority
summary: MPTA Chairman David Howard emphasizes safety as the 'number one' priority as the new transit authority takes shape in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Reassures the public about the commitment to safety in the development of the new transit system.

title: Driver Rescued After Car Rollover
summary: A driver was rescued after a car rolled over in a crash on Decapolis Drive in east Charlotte around 1 p.m.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the importance of safe driving practices and the potential dangers of car accidents.

title: I-85 North Reopens After Crash
summary: I-85 North in Gaston County reopens after a crash blocked all lanes at Exit 27 on Saturday morning.
charlotte_impact: Informs commuters about traffic disruptions and the efforts to restore normal traffic flow.
